notes: Self-powered compact linear line array loudspeaker. Standard units ship with XLR 5-pin connectors supporting both balanced audio and RMS (Remote Monitoring System) network on pins 4/5. XLR 3-pin variants exist that provide audio only without RMS. The XLR5 connector type is not in the controlled list — xlr5 is used. powerCON 20 maps to the schema's 'powercon' connector. RMS is a two-conductor twisted-pair network embedded in the XLR 5-pin connector (pins 4/5), not a separate physical port. Not rack-mountable (line array cabinet).

ports.name: Input
ports.note: XLR 5-pin female; pins 2/3 carry balanced audio, pins 4/5 carry RMS network signal. XLR 3-pin female variant available (audio only, no RMS).

ports.name: Loop Output
ports.note: XLR 5-pin male loop output; wired in parallel to Input, passes unbuffered source signal even when unit is powered off. XLR 3-pin male variant available.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: powerCON 20 (Neutrik blue, NAC3MPA-1 style) AC power input. 100–240 V AC, 50/60 Hz, auto-selecting.

ports.name: AC Loop Out
ports.note: powerCON 20 loop output for daisy-chaining AC power to adjacent cabinet.
